Off Calendar Jan-27-2020 Continued To Feb-19-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Find That Asset Is Property Of Trust Under Probate Code 17200(B)(4), 850(A)(3), & 856
Off Calendar Dec-16-2019 Continued To Jan-27-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Maureen McFadden for Petitioner.

The Court noted that there is a service issue. Ms. McFadden stated that one Heir has been avoiding service, that the Heir has refused to authorize that the Brother receive service on his behalf and that he was supposed to be here today. Ms. McFadden also requested one final continuance and stated that she will file the trust document. The Petition to Find Asset is Property of the Trust is continued to January 27, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
